subcodes.first_line: O thou who art engaged in the service of the Cause of God! Render thanks unto the pure and holy Lord that thou hast been confirmed in such grace and heavenly bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مشتغل بخدمت امرالله شکر پاک یزدانرا که بچنین فضل و موهبتی موید گشتی و
subcodes.subjects: @predictions and prophecies, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
